resources.string: MT Auto Clicker uses Accessibility to perform taps and clicks at positions you choose on screen. This is required for automation outside the browser on Chrome OS and Android. MT Auto Clicker only clicks where you place targets — it does not read passwords or personal data.
Allow MT Auto Clicker to show the floating control bar while you automate other apps.
Enable MT Auto Clicker under Accessibility so it can perform clicks at your chosen screen positions.
